allowedDivergences.reason: Cel.Compiled formats timestamps with DateTimeOffset.ToString("o") while cel-go uses CEL's canonical timestamp formatting.
cel-go surfaces invalid string-to-int conversions as a generic runtime/type-conversion error rather than the more specific invalid_argument category used by Cel.Compiled.
cel-go surfaces invalid string-to-duration conversions as a generic runtime/type-conversion error rather than the more specific invalid_argument category used by Cel.Compiled.
